item.description:
🎉 New Features

  • Hide the Glow icon: Reclaim menu bar space — you can now hide the Glow icon entirely and access hidden items through your hotkey.
  • Hide the GlowBar toggle: Same idea for the GlowBar button. Keep the feature, lose the icon.
  • Choose where the GlowBar appears: Anchor it to your icon, align it to the right edge of the screen, or have it pop up right under your cursor — pick what fits your workflow.
  • Hover to reveal the GlowBar: Flick your mouse toward the GlowBar and it opens automatically. It hides again based on your rehide preferences.
  • Focused display only: If you use multiple monitors, Glow can now show its overlay only on the display you're actively working on, keeping the others clean.
  • Always-Hidden section ↔ GlowBar: Switch between the classic inline Hidden section and the floating GlowBar panel — items move over automatically, nothing gets lost.

✨ Improvements

  • Clearer Essentials sections: Renamed to Startup & Dock and Display & Integration so each section's purpose is obvious.
  • Smarter Icon Animation tooltip: When Icon Animation can't be used (for example, with Motion off or the item counter enabled), the tooltip now tells you exactly why — no more guessing.
  • Smarter Contour Style option: The Contour Style picker only shows up when your corner radius are actually different. If all corners match, the option stays out of the way.
  • Reveal preferences stick: If you turn off hover, click, and scroll reveals on purpose, Glow remembers — it won't quietly re-enable hover when you relaunch.
  • Consistent section colors: Icons and accents across Settings now share the same section color, so the UI feels more coherent.

🐛 Fixes

  • Fullscreen glitches gone: Capsules could flicker or draw incorrectly when entering fullscreen. Transitions are now clean.
  • Overlay no longer gets stuck after fullscreen: In rare cases Glow stayed "paused" after exiting fullscreen and wouldn't come back. It now reliably resumes.
  • Hidden capsule rendering is more reliable: Fixed inconsistencies in how the hidden section's capsule appeared depending on icon visibility.
  • Dragging items in Layout Settings feels better: Drag operations no longer collide with background animations — rearranging items is smoother and more responsive.
  • Better drag diagnostics under the hood: When drags fail or time out, Glow now captures more context so issues are easier to track down.
